summary: Product Catalog Filter Implementation Tested. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests pass (100%). All commercial endpoints correctly filter out 'unimportant' products. Filter excludes products where: product_id IS NULL, sale_ok != true, purchase_ok != false, or name matches patterns: correa, saco, bolsa, probador, paneton, publicitario. Orders with 0 remaining lines after filtering are excluded from results. Frontend: ComercialPage and CuentaDetalle pages load correctly but external Odoo database queries are very slow (41+ seconds).

minor.issue: Slow response time due to external Odoo database (41+ seconds)
minor.priority: LOW - External DB issue, not code issue

passed_tests: Backend: /api/comercial/orders requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/comercial/orders returns orders with lines_count > 0 only (no empty orders)
Backend: /api/comercial/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/comercial/lines returns no excluded products (correa, saco, bolsa, probador, paneton, publicitario)
Backend: /api/comercial/lines returns positive metrics (orders_count > 0, qty_total > 0)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/metrics requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/metrics returns filtered counts for account
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/orders requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/orders returns orders with lines_count > 0 only
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion returns classification without excluded products
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/detail requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/detail returns line details without excluded products
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines returns only filtered lines
Backend: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines with SALE doc_tipo returns filtered data
Backend: KPI consistency - orders_count matches between /orders and /lines endpoints
Backend: Cuenta orders all have positive lines_count
Backend: No 'correa' in commercial lines
Backend: No 'saco' in commercial lines (Camisaco is valid)
Backend: No 'bolsa' in commercial lines
Backend: No 'probador' in commercial lines
Backend: No 'paneton' in commercial lines
Backend: No 'publicitario' in commercial lines
Frontend: ComercialPage loads and navigates correctly
Frontend: CuentaDetalle page loads and displays Info Ventas tab
Frontend: Classification table shows 93 rows of filtered data
Frontend: No excluded product patterns in UI content
critical_code_review_comments: db.py v_comercial_mov_flat view (line ~859): Correctly applies catalog filter with INNER JOIN to product_template and filters sale_ok=true, purchase_ok=false, and NOT ILIKE patterns
db.py v_comercial_order_header view (line ~959): Aggregates qty_total and lines_count from filtered pos_order_line rows, ensuring orders with 0 valid lines are excluded
server.py _CATALOG_JOIN/_CATALOG_FILTER constants (line ~700): Reusable filter patterns applied to all cuenta-level ventas endpoints
routers/comercial.py reads from filtered views crm.v_comercial_order_header and crm.v_comercial_mov_flat correctly
'Camisaco' is NOT filtered because it's a valid clothing type (shirt-jacket), not 'saco' (bag)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (pages load correctly, data displays filtered results)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from external Odoo database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Catalog Filter verified. Filter logic in db.py views: v_comercial_mov_flat (line ~859) and v_comercial_order_header (line ~959). Filter criteria: product_id IS NOT NULL, sale_ok=true, purchase_ok=false, name NOT ILIKE patterns (correa, saco, bolsa, probador, paneton, publicitario). Account-level endpoints in server.py use _CATALOG_JOIN/_CATALOG_FILTER constants (line ~700). 'Camisaco' is NOT filtered (valid clothing type). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_product_catalog_filter.py (24 tests). Note: External Odoo DB queries are slow (41+ seconds for /comercial/orders).
